rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption has no relation to Fam. Code §264.902, which governs parental child safety placement agreements. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: Sec. 264.902. PARENTAL CHILD SAFETY PLACEMENT AGREEMENT.
_note: Rule text concerns child safety placements; proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemption. No conflict.
